notes: Scope for this test: - Use only our test groups/supergroups, not channels - You may join eligible groups, read them, post one outbound opener, handle inbound group replies, and reply in DMs only after the other person messages first - Do not use or target broadcast channels - Do not expand outside our test spaces - Treat this as a live business validation of discovery, planning, first outreach, engagement handling, and operator reporting Seed test spaces: @swarmtestgroup https://t.me/swarmtest2 https://t.me/swarmtest3 2. queue only allowed actions 3. send one clean outbound opener into a valid test group 4. react sensibly to inbound replies 5. report exact outcomes, blockers, and next steps
source_messages: Goal: run a realistic end-to-end outbound Telegram sandbox campaign inside our owned test groups only. Scope for this test: - Use only our test groups/supergroups, not channels - You may join eligible groups, read them, post one outbound opener, handle inbound group replies, and reply in DMs only after the other person messages first - Do not use or target broadcast channels - Do not expand outside our test spaces - Treat this as a live business validation of discovery, planning, first outreach, engagement handling, and operator reporting Seed test spaces: @swarmtestgroup https://t.me/swarmtest2 https://t.me/swarmtest3 Success criteria: 1. classify targets correctly 2. queue only allowed actions 3. send one clean outbound opener into a valid test group 4. react sensibly to inbound replies 5. report exact outcomes, blockers, and next steps
yeah I'm the only other member in the group but pretend it's real. your persona is growth marketer.

okay, let's change the scope a bit. so you are prmoting tgswarm. an agenting telegram outbound marketing machine. and basically your conversion target is @wazelaver. basically you lead people down your funnel and this account is where you try to convert them to. dont be too timid and too salesy. just act like a normal growth marketer
